subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-25
subcodes.first_line: I have set a conflagration throughout America. Its results will become known later. Wait for a few years and you will behold the appearance of many traces.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @predictions and prophecies, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause, @Christ; Christianity
